column1: Hey Brooke, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
A girl in my group,Mia, has Also been reaching out I just thought it would be easier if I helped as well. Our break is March 7-15
Yea all good! Mia from which school? Ole miss?
did she get to send you the info or do you want me to send it over?
yea no prob. were y'all lookin to get things booked today?
yea all good. I'll add the payment plan which allows you to reserve with a deposit then worry about the rest of the booking process later
cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
bet got it! will send rn

hey just sent that over lmk if it came through. I can hook it up with a discount on some of the prices you see there too just lmk if we wnna do the 4 night or 5. I'll personally be on the occidental punta cana package
would be dope to have y'all there
heyy brooke what's up, did that email ever come through?
Yes sorry I have been super busy recently. I will talk to my group about it
All good. yea lmk, just wanna make sure I can hook it up for you
I have that discount valid for a little
Brookeee what's up, hows convos with the group goin?
heyy checkin in, hows the group feelin?
sup! you still lookin for our help with spring break?
Hi I'm on thanksgiving break right now but I will talk with my friends
all goooood, enjoy the break talk soon
Loved “all goooood, enjoy the break talk soon”
heyyy checkin in, did you get to talk everything over with your squad?
We are having a confirmed meet up to discuss it on Saturday
Cool sounds good. Lmk if you need me to hop on call to answer any questions Sat
heyy Brooke whats up, how we lookin with things? Anyone have any questions before y'all meet?
No I'll let you know later
heyy Brooke whats up, how we lookin for spring break?
sup! you still lookin for help getting situated for spring break?
whats up Brooke did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?

Sorry for taking so long to respond. We figured we would take matters into our own hands and narrowed it down. However could we get your advice? Out of these choices to do know which one has the most college kids and is the most fun?
If you want me to be the most very honest
None of them will have a mass amount of college students
But all are nice resorts, you'll see a few, but not a heavy amonny
Do you work for schools like fsu?
I know they go on spring break through companies like yall
yea we got a bunch of groups from FSU. mostly frats and sororities
Ok so my friends mom helped us with this since she wanted to take control. But if you're ok with it could we compare it to what your deals look like?
Ahh got you. I mean yea she didn't do bad but those resorts just aren't really college spring break resorts. Breathless used to be but not anymore
is it easier if I chat with her mom directly? to help you
Gotcha gotcha. It would be easier to chat with probably just Mia or I.
heres the Punta Cana options I recommend https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/PWBTCUAWIV
Thank you I just sent it to her she takes a while to respond but once she does I'll let you know
Hi! I just talked with my group and we are Interested in the riu republic.
Or which one do you think would be better. We love to party and have fun and want to be with other college kids
They're both cool, but Occidental Punta Cana will be more college students
Ok then we are thinking the occidental
Yes that's where I'll be too so would be dope to have you there
Do you think we could still book with you or is it too late?
We can make it happen. I'll hook it up
We're yall ready to get started this weekend?
Liked “We can make it happen. I'll hook it up”
Okay dope let's do it, I'll set up the reservation now. How many ppl do we have total as of now? Just so I know how many slots to start with
Don't know if everyone is a definite but I do know most are and we don't want to wait any longer
That might sound cold hearted sorry, I just don't want to wait and then it's too late
Lol I got you. will send this in a few and the ppl that are ready can slide in and deposit to secure their own spots
just sent lmk if you got it! excited for y'all
So there's only 8 people on this would it be easier if we did 12?
Thank you I forwarded the email to all of my friends
Before I pay, I've been reading through the agreements. Are flights included?
Nah that part of the it doesn't apply to you since you don't have flights in your package
We have some groups that have flights, and one general customer agreement. So everything is in thrte

I have a few other questions. If we want to book a booze cruise is that through yall or the hotel? Is it fine if we plan on staying at the resort? And what are the best places to book a reservation/ parties?
Yea I can do the booze cruise for you. It can be added right into your individual accounts within the portal. As an add on option
Yea staying on the resort isn't bad at all. A lot of ppl do, there's enough going on
Loved “Yea staying on the resort isn't bad at all. A lot of ppl do, there's enough going on”
The nightclub on the resort is included in your package, and you'll be able to go to all of the events we host on the resort. We have a dope pool party and beach party

For reservations, there are specialty restaurants on the resort that are pretty good. You're able to set a reservation for those on site when you get there. Our team can help you get situated with those
Excited for y'all, I'm actually gonna be there too. Gonna be dope to meet y'all
Reacted 🔥 to “The nightclub on the resort is included in your package, and you'll be able to go to all of the events we host on the resort. We have a dope pool party and beach party”
Can I add the booze cruise onto my account or is that something you can only do. I'm just worried some of my friends won't want to pay for it and I want to give people the option
I'm so sorry remind me your name again
Yea you can add them in yourselves. But if you want me to add it in to yours specifically just lmk and I'll do it on the back end
You have plenty of time to add it in tho. Up until 2 days before the trip
Le gusta “You have plenty of time to add it in tho. Up until 2 days before the trip”
Ok great. I can add mine myself since I want to show my friends how to do it.
Okay bet yea, just go to the add ons tab
Liked “Okay bet yea, just go to the add ons tab”
Lmaoo not that one but I'm def in a bunch of those vids on tik tok and IG
Lollll ohh nah pretty sure end of that vid they gave me a shout out
What is the party package imagine?
Imagine Cave nightclub. Super dope spot that we host ay
If I don't put it, could I still go since we have the party package included?
What you have included is all of the parties and events that happen on the resort
Imagine is part of the off resort party pass, which you don't have
It's an add on like you're seeing
Comes with transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort events
And is it just for one night?
Yea we host at Imagine one night. Each party pass event has its designated night
Do you know it any other ole miss students are going?
Yea there are a couple groups
Loved “Yea there are a couple groups”
I just put my deposit down
Lmk if anyone needs help or has questions
Liked “Lmk if anyone needs help or has questions”
I will definitely be texting you in the future
Hi sorry my friend Ava accidentally signed up for room one and two and doesn't know how to cancel her spot for room one. Could you take her off? In room one is supposed to be me Mia Kinley and ruby
Sorry I meant she's in room one not two. Whichever room I am in ava is
all good ill just move her over
or did she sign up twice?
Is it ok if I give your number to my friend Rob? Him and his friends want to go as well?
We could also just add him onto yours I can add more rooms
Ok I'll let you know once he decides
I ended up giving Rob your number so heads up if you get a text from him.
Should we give him a code word so I know it's him
What should it be. something funny
Hi! I was going to pay for the rest of the trip, and it is saying that I haven't paid anything, nor will it let me pay more. It just says to speak with the trip organizer.
Yea looks like you made 2 accounts at one point
brookecookie@outlook.com is the email you used for log in on the active account
Ok I got it thank you and sorry
Liked “brookecookie@outlook.com is the email you used for log in on the active account”
Ok I just paid for the remaining amount + the booze cruise. It says I still have 89$ to pay but the rest of the crew doesn't want to do the party as of now. Am I good with that just on my account?
Yea youre good, looks like you dded the Imagine Cave night?
Yes but I'm not sure if I will buy it
aight word just lmk if you need me to take it off ever
Le gusta “aight word just lmk if you need me to take it off ever”
yoo Brooke is it just gonna be the 8 of you on the trip? we had 12 slots initially
Hi, I think it's just the 8 of us
hey checkin in, Ava, Mia and Leslie are behind on payments, do they still plan on going?
Yes I'm so sorry I will remind them again
hey any update on them? Mia and Leslie are still behind, operations may remove them
I am so sorry I will tell them once again
Mia just paid and Kennedy is doing it soon. Did you get Mia's payment
Hi spiffy! I just put my flight information In, and we are getting excited. My friends are unsure if any of us have purchased trip inclusions. Could you please tell me if anyone is our party has?
right now it looks like youre the only one with the party pass. you have the Imagine Cave night and the booze cruise. did evryone want that added in?
hey whenever you have a sec, if you guys could upload your flight info so we can finalize your airport transfers
Also did everyone wanna do the Imagine club night? Def recommend that
Hi! I uploaded my flight Info but I will tell the others to do so asap. And I will ask about the night club. If nobody else does it is there a way to get my money back?
and yea I can remove it from your account, and once you guys decide you can re-add it
hey just need Mia and Ruby to add their flights, and you guys will be all set!
Ok I will let them know.. again.
yoo Brooke! I just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
how we lookin did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?

Hi! I just filled out my forms and told my friends to do so as well. As for the extra add ons. I think we are all going to do the booze cruise and wait to decide about the party pass. I'll let them add the cruise on by themselves though
dope aight sounds good. you'll wanna screenshot that last page and QR code the e-ticket gave you so you have it for when you board
and yea just lmk if anyone wants me to add the booze cruise in for them
Le gusta “dope aight sounds good. you'll wanna screenshot that last page and QR code the e-ticket gave you so you have it for when you board”
We have a problem. Ruby can no longer come with us on spring break. She knows the refund policy, I'm just letting you know.
Le gusta “and yea just lmk if anyone wants me to add the booze cruise in for them”
Ahh aight all good. assuming she didnt get the insurance?
and yo any word on Mia's flight info lol. she's laggin
she on the same flight as anyone else?
She's going to do it right now. And no she's on a different flight but arriving around the same time. As for Ruby I don't think she did get the insurance
Hi I have a question. Since there are a couple of us in different flights, is there a way to get separate transportation ?
Yea everyone's arrival time is treated individually
The team will be ready for each of you when you land
Le encanta “The team will be ready for each of you when you land”
Hi would you mind adding the booze cruise to Kinley's account
yo! safe travels, see y'all out here soon
We are otw and excited! If everything plays out right, mia lands 10minutes before us. Can me Mia kinley and Ava all ride together to the resort?
Yea very very likely. But depends how long the customs line is
Le gusta “Yea very very likely. But depends how long the customs line is”
safe travels tho! see y'all out here soon
My friends are just landing and can't find blue tours
Are they still at the airport?
Hey yea keep walking through the exit lobby there's a booth it'll be on your right hand side
I am at the resort with 3 others
But 3 are still traveling and confused
Word yea the booth is the same spot still
Liked “Word yea the booth is the same spot still”
If y'all lookin for a party tonight pull by the nightclub on the resort later on
